achievements.title: Rosy Beginnings
achievements.description: Start any game mode to unlock a picture in the Gallery

achievements.description: Start "Mode A" and "Mode C" at least once to unlock a picture in the Gallery

achievements.description: Get to Phase 02 in "Mode A" to unlock a picture in the Gallery

achievements.description: Get to Phase 03 in "Mode A" to unlock a picture in the Gallery

achievements.description: Make it to Phase 02 in "Mode C" to unlock a picture in the Gallery

achievements.description: Make it to Phase 03 in "Mode C" to unlock a picture in the Gallery

achievements.description: Make it to Phase 04 in "Mode C" to unlock a picture in the Gallery

achievements.description: Make it to Phase 05 in "Mode C" to unlock a picture in the Gallery

achievements.title: Fight of the 35 Year Old
achievements.description: Clear all 99 phases in "Mode A"
achievements.author: Butternnife

achievements.title: Trip of a 35 Year Old
achievements.description: Clear all 99 phases in "Mode C"

achievements.title: Balloon Popper Newbie
achievements.description: Get a Super Perfect Bonus in the Pink Balloon Bonus Stage

achievements.description: Get a Super Perfect Bonus in the Green Balloon Bonus Stage
achievements.author: Butternnife

achievements.title: Balloon Popper Pro
achievements.description: Get a Super Perfect Bonus in a Yellow Balloon Stage
achievements.author: Butternnife

achievements.title: No Touching Tingle
achievements.description: Make it to Phase 11 from Phase 01 in Mode A without losing a life or a balloon
achievements.author: Butternnife

achievements.title: Tenacity of Tingle
achievements.description: Make it to Phase 50 from Phase 01 with 1 life in Mode A (Must turn lives to 1 in options menu)

achievements.title: Tingle Trip
achievements.description: Get a score of 25000 or higher in Mode C

achievements.title: The Top Tingle Trip
